source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/05_해외 등록 서류 (영업팀 F-up)/251021 대만 APLUSBIO - P1, 23G/3. NCC/Detector - WIFI Module NCC Certi & Test report/WBW880A_NCC test report 1_4-1-1 WLAN 2.4G測試報告-Rev01-190503.pdf

document.title: 低功率射頻電機測試報告
standards: NCC 低功率射頻電機技術規範

sourceSummary.oneLine: NCC low-power radio-frequency device test report for SAMSUNG Wifi Module model WBW880A, covering 2.4GHz WLAN functions.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports regulatory assessment of WBW880A against NCC low-power RF requirements for conducted emissions, radiated emissions, bandwidth, output power, band-edge emissions, spurious emissions, power density, and RF exposure.
keyPoints: Applicant is 友信行股份有限公司 and manufacturer is Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.
Report number is EM-NC190051 and case number is C1M1902181.
The report states all listed 2.4GHz test items were judged 合格.
The report states it was made for 2.4GHz function; UNII and DFS functions are covered in separate report numbers EM-NC190052 and EM-NC190053.

entities.name: WBW880A
entities.evidence: 器材名稱: Wifi Module; 廠牌: SAMSUNG; 型號: WBW880A

entities.name: 友信行股份有限公司
entities.evidence: 申請廠商 ： 友信行股份有限公司

entities.name: Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.
entities.evidence: 製造廠商 ： Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.

entities.name: 敦吉檢測科技股份有限公司電磁相容部
entities.evidence: 測試實驗室 ： 敦吉檢測科技股份有限公司電磁相容部

entities.name: NCC
entities.evidence: 本測試報告之所有項目皆依據 NCC 低功率射頻電機技術規範和一致性會議執行檢驗

concepts.name: NCC low-power RF technical specification
concepts.pageTarget: NCC Low-Power Radio-Frequency Devices Technical Specification
concepts.evidence: 本測試報告之所有項目皆依據 NCC 低功率射頻電機技術規範和一致性會議執行檢驗

concepts.name: 2.4GHz digital modulation transmitter
concepts.evidence: 依低功率射頻電機技術規範 3.10.1 節，工作頻率為 2400-2483.5MHz，採用數位調變技術之發射器具。

concepts.name: Conducted emission voltage
concepts.evidence: 電源傳導干擾電壓 低功率射頻電機技術規範 2.3節 ... 合格

concepts.name: Radiated field strength
concepts.evidence: 場強輻射 低功率射頻電機技術規範 3.10.1.5節、2.8節 ... 合格

concepts.name: 6 dB emission bandwidth
concepts.evidence: 依據 NCC 低功率射頻電機技術規範 3.10.1.6 節(2)(A)之規定，6 dB 頻寬至少應有 500 kHz。

concepts.name: Peak output power
concepts.evidence: 依據 NCC 低功率射頻電機技術規範 3.10.1.2 節(1)(C)之規定，操作 2400 MHz～2483.5 MHz 頻段者，數位調變技術系統：1 W(含) 以下

concepts.name: Band-edge RF conducted emission
concepts.evidence: 頻帶邊緣之RF 傳導發射 低功率射頻電機技術規範 3.10.1.5節 ... 合格

concepts.name: Spurious RF conducted emission
concepts.evidence: 混附發射之RF 傳導發射 低功率射頻電機技術規範 3.10.1.5節(1)、2.8節 ... 合格

concepts.name: Power density
concepts.evidence: 依據 NCC 低功率射頻電機技術規範 3.10.1.6 節(2)(B)之規定，在使用頻率範圍之任一 3 kHz 頻寬內...皆小於或等於 8 毫分貝(dBm)

concepts.name: Maximum permissible exposure
concepts.evidence: 可測試最大暴露允許值(Maximum Permissible Exposure，MPE)以證明其符電波暴露量之要求。

concepts.name: DFS slave without radar detection
concepts.pageTarget: DFS Slave Without Radar Detection Function
concepts.evidence: 具 IEEE802.11a/b/g/n/ac 及 DFS Function-Slave (Without radar detection function)。

concepts.name: Fixed antenna requirement
concepts.pageTarget: Fixed Antenna Requirement for Low-Power RF Devices
concepts.evidence: 此裝置使用固定式天線，其天線資料如下...註:天線已符合NCC低功率射頻電機技術規範2.2.節之規定

evidence.claim: The document is a low-power radio-frequency device test report.
evidence.evidenceText: 低功率射頻電機測試報告

evidence.claim: The report number is EM-NC190051.
evidence.evidenceText: 報告號碼 ： EM-NC190051

evidence.claim: The case number is C1M1902181.
evidence.evidenceText: 案件編號 ： C1M1902181

evidence.claim: The completion date is 2019年03月21日.
evidence.evidenceText: 完成日期 ： 2019年03月21日

evidence.claim: The test dates were 2019年03月11日 to 14日.
evidence.evidenceText: 測試日期 ： 2019 年 03 月 11 日 ~ 14 日

evidence.claim: The device name is Wifi Module, brand SAMSUNG, model WBW880A.
evidence.evidenceText: 器材名稱: Wifi Module 廠牌: SAMSUNG 型號: WBW880A

evidence.claim: The applicant is 友信行股份有限公司.
evidence.evidenceText: 申請廠商 ： 友信行股份有限公司

evidence.claim: The manufacturer is Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.
evidence.evidenceText: 製造廠商 ： Samsung Electronics Co., Ltd.

evidence.claim: The test laboratory is 敦吉檢測科技股份有限公司電磁相容部.
evidence.evidenceText: 測試實驗室 ： 敦吉檢測科技股份有限公司電磁相容部
evidence.pageTarget: 敦吉檢測科技股份有限公司電磁相容部

evidence.claim: The report is for the 2.4GHz function of the product.
evidence.evidenceText: 此份報告是針對 2.4GHz 功能進行製作

evidence.claim: UNII Band I, II, III, IV functions are covered by report EM-NC190052.
evidence.evidenceText: 至於 UNII Band I、II、III、IV 功能於報告號碼(EM-NC190052)

evidence.claim: UNII Band II and III DFS functions are covered by report EM-NC190053.
evidence.evidenceText: 至於 UNII Band II、III 之 DFS 功能於報告號碼(EM-NC190053)。

evidence.claim: The device supports IEEE802.11a/b/g/n/ac and DFS Function-Slave without radar detection function.
evidence.evidenceText: 此裝置系統為 Wifi Module，具 IEEE802.11a/b/g/n/ac 及 DFS Function-Slave (Without radar detection function)。

evidence.claim: For 802.11b/g/n-HT20 the working frequency range is 2412-2472 MHz with 13 channels.
For 802.11n-HT40 the working frequency range is 2422-2462 MHz with 9 channels.
The 2.4GHz peak transmit powers listed are 14.43 dBm for 802.11b, 15.82 dBm for 802.11g, 16.19 dBm for 802.11n-HT20, and 16.63 dBm for 802.11n-HT40.
The product uses fixed antennas and the report states the antennas comply with NCC low-power RF technical specification section 2.2.
evidence.evidenceText: 此裝置使用固定式天線...註:天線已符合NCC低功率射頻電機技術規範2.2.節之規定

evidence.claim: All test items in the summary table were judged 合格.
evidence.evidenceText: 電源傳導干擾電壓...合格; 場強輻射...合格; 發射頻寬...合格; 峰值輸出功率...合格; 頻帶邊緣之RF 傳導發射...合格; 混附發射之RF 傳導發射...合格; 功率密度...合格; 電波暴露量...合格

evidence.claim: The applicable specification revision date is 2018年01月10日.
evidence.evidenceText: 本產品所適用之規範修訂日期 2018 年 01 月 10 日。
evidence.pageTarget: NCC Low-Power Radio-Frequency Devices Technical Specification

evidence.claim: The testing method basis is NCC low-power RF technical specification and conformity meetings, with other national and international standards used where not specified.
evidence.evidenceText: 本測試報告之所有項目皆依據 NCC 低功率射頻電機技術規範和一致性會議執行檢驗，未規範者依國家標準辦理，無國家標準可適用者，依 IEEE ANSI、歐盟 ETSI EN 與美國 EIA、FCC 47 CFR PART 2、KDB 及 ARIB STD-T67 等有關檢驗之規定。
evidence.pageTarget: NCC Low-Power Radio-Frequency Devices Technical Specification

evidence.claim: The MPE requirement applies for transmitters more than 20 cm from the human body in normal operating mode.
evidence.evidenceText: 受測物於正常操作模式下，其發射機距離人體20公分以上者，可測試最大暴露允許值(Maximum Permissible Exposure，MPE)以證明其符電波暴露量之要求。

reviewFlags.reason: Document revision/version is not stated in the extracted text; filename contains Rev01 but the document body does not confirm it.
Appendix One detailed measurement result tables are referenced but not included in the provided source text.
Duty Cycle pages contain incomplete or degraded OCR/table extraction, especially pages 15-16.
